prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-TANGOSCOPE-40001-TRM Product Type: AIMING_SCOPE_SIGHT Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline Ops Tango RM Articulating Picatinny Rail Mount Scope Bubble Level Shooter Optics Description: The TANGO RM ACCU/LEVEL is Flatline Ops' newest and only Picatinny rail mounted scope level, fitting all Mil-Spec rails. It boasts the industry's only 'fine adjustable level feature after you install, for micro-adjustments. The ultra-low design fits under low-mounted scope tubes - without removing the scope. A long-range shot has many factors to take into consideration to be sure you are on target, and our ACCU/LEVEL system aids in the correction of "can't error," giving you dead-on true vertical hold. The level also features an ultra-low profile and machine precision design to make sure you are locked into place before taking that critical shot.


IMPORTANT installation note, the Tango RM only fits true Mil-Spec Picatinny rails. Non-mil-spec or custom brand pic rails may result in installation issues. Please check to see if your application will work.


Minimal scope clearance: The minimal scope clearance you need for the Tango RM is 1/8" between your scope and rail.


Each level is machined from advanced 6061-T6 aircraft aluminum and then black hard anodized to protect it from the extremes of the outdoors. The level is also designed to fit right- or left-handed shooters.


High-visibility fluorescent green fluid level is easy to visually acquire and locate before each shot.

Installation tool included

Fluid is not chemically enhanced with properties to actually glow or fluoresce in black-out scenarios.

TECH SPECS
IMPORTANT installation note, the Tango RM only fits true Mil-Spec Picatinny rails. Non-milspec or custom brand pic rails may result in installation issues. Please check to see if your application will work.
Mounting: Picatinny rail mount
Profile: Ultra-low profile for under scope
Material: 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum Search Terms: scope level firearms accessories scopes thermal spotting reticle rifle sling bubble accuracy picatinny accurate first leevl anti cant leveling jig Features: - RAIL MOUNTED ACCURACY - The Tango RM is our newest and only picatinny rail mounted scope level, fitting all MilSpec Rails. Our ACCU/LEVEL system aids in the correction of "can't error," giving you dead-on true vertical hold. - SOLID, DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Each level is machined from advanced 6061-T6 aircraft aluminum and then black hard anodized to protect it from the extremes of the outdoors. It's also designed to fit either right or left-handed shooters. - HIGH VISIBILITY - Made with high visibility fluorescent fluid, the green level is easy to visually acquire and locate before each shot. - ULTRA-LOW DESIGN - This scope level was designed with ultra-low profile and machine precision in mind to make sure you are locked into place before taking that critical shot. - TECH SPECS - Quick and easy installation (comes with instructions and tools); Mounting: Picatinny rail mount; Profile: ultra-low profile for under scope; Material: 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum; Finish: MilSpec Type III Black Hard Anodized; Hardware: Stainless Steel; Level: High Visibility Fluorescent green fluid === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
